content: Rhoda Goldman Plaza is very, very good, but too expensive. What negates all of it is that they will not take care of someone who needs 24-hour care.

title: Rhoda Goldman Plaza (UPDATED) - Get Pricing, See 12 Photos & Read Reviews in San Francisco, CA
content: See all assisted living in San Francisco. Rhoda Goldman Plaza, San Francisco, CA 1. # Rhoda Goldman Plaza. Rhoda Goldman Plaza is an Assisted Living community in the San Francisco area that also offers Memory Care. Rhoda Goldman Plaza stands as a beacon of exceptional care and community in the heart of its vibrant neighborhood. This senior living community has made its mark through a commitment to providing top-tier medical services and a nurturing environment that feels like family. The glowing reviews from residents and their families underscore the high standards of care and service at Rhoda Goldman Plaza. Nestled in a charming neighborhood, Rhoda Goldman Plaza offers the convenience of a 96 walk score, making it easy for residents to access nearby amenities. Rhoda Goldman Plaza's connection to Jewish Family and Children’s Services further enhances its offerings, providing residents with access to a robust continuum of care. ### About the Staff at Rhoda Goldman Plaza.
